# terrible_amazon_aws_ec2_import_image (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `task_name` (String) The name of the EC2 image import task.

### Optional

- `architecture` (String) The architecture of the virtual machine.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `boot_mode` (String) The boot mode of the virtual machine.
- `cancel_reason` (String) The reason for canceling the task.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `client_data` (String) The client-specific data.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) A description string for the import image task.
- `disk_containers` (String) Information about the disk containers.
- `encrypted` (Boolean) Specifies whether the destination AMI of the imported image should be encrypted. The default KMS key for EBS is used unless you specify a non-default KMS key using `kms_key_id`.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `hypervisor` (String) The target hypervisor platform.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `kms_key_id` (String) An identifier for the symmetric KMS key to use when creating the encrypted AMI. This parameter is only required if you want to use a non-default KMS key; if this parameter is not specified, the default KMS key for EBS is used. If a `kms_key_id` is specified, the `encrypted` flag must also be set.
- `license_specifications` (String) The ARNs of the license configurations.
- `license_type` (String) The license type to be used for the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) after importing.
- `platform` (String) The operating system of the virtual machine.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `role_name` (String) The name of the role to use when not using the default role, 'vmimport'.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `state=present` to import single or multi-volume disk images or EBS snapshots into an Amazon Machine Image (AMI). Use `state=absent` to cancel an in-process import virtual machine task.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `usage_operation` (String) The usage operation value.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `import_image` (String) A dict containing information about an EC2 import task.
